tracks.rawText: 5:13Paola Perezv5.5Barely-there reggae-metal tech dub at a whisper-quiet dynamic: muted one-drop on brushed snare, soft rim clicks, subby kick, and a dubwise bassline filtered low with tape delay, Distant drop-tuned guitar harmonics, industrial clicks, sparse synth drones, and cavernous spring reverb create a cold, late-night edgeRoxyPublishRemix
tracks.title: Paola Perez
